zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线维持上行格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报价8.9085，24小时微跌0.16%，整体仍处于窄幅震荡区间。价格运行于20日均线8.8726上方，显示短期多头仍占据一定优势，但上涨动能暂未明显放大，市场处于蓄势整理阶段。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为0.0052并保持在零轴上方，反映多头力量略占上风，趋势结构偏积极。由于RSI数据暂缺，市场超买或超卖状态难以确认，但价格稳定站稳均线，对短线走势形成一定支撑。

关键支撑位关注8.87美元附近，即20日均线区域；若失守，则下方支撑看向8.80美元。上方阻力首先位于8.93美元日内高点附近，突破后有望进一步测试9.00美元整数关口，该位置将成为多空争夺重点。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注8.87美元附近回踩企稳后的低吸机会，以8.80美元作为风险控制位。稳健投资者则建议等待价格有效突破8.93美元并放量确认后再顺势跟进，短线维持偏多思路，但需警惕突破失败引发的回调风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 8.9085, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average of 8.8726. This positioning suggests a mildly constructive short-term trend despite the modest 24-hour decline of 0.16%. Price action remains compressed between 8.9061 and 8.9340, indicating a period of consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. Buyers have managed to defend levels near the moving average, helping maintain a neutral-to-bullish near-term structure.

Momentum indicators provide a cautiously positive signal. The MACD value of 0.0052 remains above zero, indicating that bullish momentum is present, although it is relatively weak and not yet supported by a strong directional breakout. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price behavior and MACD. The narrow trading range suggests market participants are waiting for a catalyst before committing to larger positions, which may lead to increased volatility once a breakout occurs.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 8.90, aligned with the session low near 8.9061. A stronger support zone can be identified around the SMA(20) at 8.87, where buyers have recently shown interest. On the upside, initial resistance sits near 8.93–8.94, corresponding to the recent high. A sustained move above this area could open the path toward the psychological 9.00 level, while a breakdown below 8.87 would weaken the current structure and increase downside risk.

Traders may consider a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 8.94 before seeking long exposure, targeting moves toward and beyond 9.00. Alternatively, short-term range traders may look to buy near support and reduce exposure near resistance. Risk management remains important, as the current low-volatility environment can quickly transition into a stronger directional move once consolidation ends.
